issues.description: Action type should be a conditional/gating mechanic that prevents attacks, not 'Rest'. The effect prevents attacking until end of opponent's next turn, which requires a duration-based prevention, not a Rest action. Should use a condition-based approach or a custom prevention mechanic.
Target filter is incomplete. Must exclude [Monkey.D.Luffy] characters explicitly. Current DSL has no exclusion condition for the character name.

Missing duration specification. Effect lasts 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar temporal constraint. Current DSL has no duration field.
